text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to interpret and understand the visual world. Using digital images or videos, it can perform tasks like image recognition, which identifies what is in a picture, and object detection, which locates specific items such as faces or vehicles. These technologies have many practical applications. For instance, in self-driving cars, computer vision helps detect pedestrians, traffic signs, and other vehicles, allowing safe navigation. It is also used in medical imaging to spot diseases and in retail for inventory management. As this technology advances, it continues to transform industries and everyday life.
